activities.name: Musée d'Orsay
activities.description: World-class Impressionist and Post-Impressionist art in a stunning Beaux-Arts railway station.

activities.name: Centre Pompidou
activities.description: Modern and contemporary art with iconic inside-out architecture and rooftop city views.

activities.name: Marché Bastille
activities.description: Large Sunday market popular with locals for produce, cheese, and street food.

activities.name: Bistrot Paul Bert
activities.description: Classic Parisian bistro experience with steak frites and wine — busy and beloved.

activities.name: Promenade Plantée / Coulée Verte
activities.description: Elevated linear park perfect for a relaxed walk away from car traffic.

activities.name: Jazz Club Caveau de la Huchette
activities.description: Historic cellar jazz club with dancing; late nights and lively crowds.

activities.name: Le Marais boutiques
activities.description: Independent fashion and design shops mixed with cafés in a walkable historic quarter.

activities.name: Sainte-Chapelle
activities.description: Gothic chapel famous for stained-glass windows; compact visit, strong visual payoff.

activities.name: Seine evening river cruise
activities.description: Sightseeing boat tour past illuminated monuments; classic tourist experience.

activities.name: TeamLab Planets
activities.description: Immersive digital art museum where visitors wade through installations.

activities.name: Tsukiji Outer Market
activities.description: Street food, seafood snacks, and kitchenware; early morning energy.

activities.name: Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden
activities.description: Spacious garden mixing French, English, and Japanese landscape styles.

activities.name: Golden Gai
activities.description: Tiny bars in narrow alleys; intimate nightlife scene with local regulars.

activities.name: Senso-ji Temple
activities.description: Tokyo's oldest temple with a bustling traditional shopping street approach.

activities.name: Shibuya Parco & surrounding
activities.description: Trendy retail, indie labels, and pop-culture floors near the famous crossing.

activities.name: Local sento (public bath) evening
activities.description: Neighborhood bathhouse ritual — low-key, authentic, and restorative after walking.

activities.name: Museu Picasso
activities.description: Extensive Picasso collection focused on early works in medieval palaces.

activities.name: Sagrada Família exterior walk
activities.description: Gaudí's basilica — even viewing from the park offers strong architecture payoff.

activities.name: Mercat de Sant Antoni
activities.description: Local market with tapas bars — less packed than Boqueria for a neighborhood feel.

activities.name: Vermut hour in Gràcia
activities.description: Pre-lunch vermouth and olives at a terrace bar in a village-like district.

activities.name: Park Güell viewpoints
activities.description: Gaudí park with mosaic terraces; nature views over the city (ticketed zones vary).

activities.name: Poble-sec tapas crawl
activities.description: Carrer de Blai pincho bars — casual late evening food and drinks.

activities.name: Barceloneta beach stroll
activities.description: Sea breeze walk; can be touristy midday but pleasant at sunset.

activities.name: Gothic Quarter artisan lanes
activities.description: Narrow streets with small shops; blend of tourist flow and hidden ateliers.
